intent: Write a quick reference on 'snacks and pantry items for a long study/work session' combining storefront inventory with productivity wisdom. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the grocery-gourmet-food category and collect at least 3 snack or drink products. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips for posts on desk snacks, sugar crashes, or study fuel. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) list the 3 picks with stats, (b) inject two community rules about avoiding crashes, (c) recommend one 'actually productive' snack. Cite every claim.
